allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "VBS 실행 시도..."; & wscript.exe "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\scripts\\launch.vbs"; Write-Host "VBS 호출 완료, 8초 대기..."; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; "---logs 폴더---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\logs\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Length, LastWriteTime; "---launch.log 마지막 50줄---"; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\logs\\launch.log"\) { Get-Content "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\logs\\launch.log" -Tail 50 } else { "launch.log 없음" }; "---관련 프로세스---"; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'node|tauri|wscript|cargo' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, StartTime | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Write-Host "--- VBS의 cmd 라인 그대로 직접 실행 ---"; cmd.exe /c 'cd /d "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent" && npm run tauri:dev > "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\logs\\launch.log" 2>&1' ; Write-Host "\(이 명령은 npm run tauri:dev가 떠 있는 동안 블로킹됩니다. 5초 후 별도 확인\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; "--- launch.log 존재? ---"; Test-Path "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\logs\\launch.log"; "--- launch.log 처음 80줄 ---"; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\logs\\launch.log"\) { Get-Content "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\K-Desktop-Agent\\logs\\launch.log" -Head 80 } ; "--- 관련 프로세스 ---"; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'node|tauri|cargo|app' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id | Format-Table)

Bash(sqlite3 "C:/Users/user/AppData/Roaming/com.k.desktop-agent/conversations.db" "SELECT id, title, message_count FROM conversations c LEFT JOIN \(SELECT conversation_id, COUNT\(*\) as message_count FROM messages GROUP BY conversation_id\) m ON m.conversation_id = c.id ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 10;")
